# Birthday Poster Creator - Workspace Setup

## Project Overview
A beautiful, interactive web application for creating personalized birthday posters with multiple themes and print-ready formatting.

## Checklist

- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
	- Project type: Interactive web application
	- Languages: HTML, CSS, JavaScript (Vanilla)
	- No frameworks or external dependencies

- [x] Scaffold the Project
	- Created project structure with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript
	- Set up .github directory for configuration
	- All files created in current directory

- [x] Customize the Project
	- Implemented poster personalization (name, age, message)
	- Added multiple theme support (Purple, Pink, Blue, Gold)
	- Created large-format poster design (8.5" x 11")
	- Responsive design for all screen sizes
	- Print-optimized styling
	- Download as PNG or print directly

- [x] Install Required Extensions
	- No extensions required (vanilla web project)

- [x] Compile the Project
	- No compilation needed (pure HTML/CSS/JavaScript)
	- Project is ready to run

- [x] Create and Run Task
	- No build task needed for this static web project
	- Can be run directly by opening index.html in a browser

- [x] Launch the Project
	- Open `index.html` in any web browser
	- Project is fully functional

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
	- README.md created with full project documentation
	- Included features, project structure, and enhancement ideas
	- Configuration documented in this file

## How to Use

1. Open the project folder in VS Code
2. Open `index.html` in your default browser (right-click → Open with Live Server, or double-click the file)
3. Customize the poster with:
   - Birthday person's name
   - Their age
   - A personalized celebratory message
   - Select a color theme
4. Preview updates in real-time
5. Download as PNG or print directly

## Features

- Large 8.5" x 11" format poster
- Four beautiful theme options
- Real-time preview updates
- Print-optimized design
- Download as PNG image
- Responsive mobile-friendly design
- No external dependencies required

✅ **Project Transformation Complete** - Birthday Card Creator has been successfully converted to Birthday Poster Creator - Ready to use and customize!
